Common.genericFormError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to comment and join the conversation.
Auth.loginFailed: Couldn't complete sign-in. You can close this window.

Post.commentsDisabled: Comments are disabled for this article.
Post.joinConversationDescription: Sign in with your account to comment on this article.
Post.translationFallbackNotice: This article hasn't been translated into this language yet. Showing the original Portuguese version.
Post.crossLanguageNotice: You're reading the {language, select, pt {Portuguese} es {Spanish} other {original}} version of this article.

Home.heroDescription: samuelsantana.dev is a personal blog about software engineering, architecture, and code — notes from someone who builds real products day to day.
Home.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the data.

Dashboard.topicsDescription: Manage the topics available for articles.
Dashboard.confirmDeleteTopicDescription: "{name}" will be removed from every article linked to it.
Dashboard.usersDescription: Manage who has access to the blog.
Dashboard.confirmDeleteUserDescription: "{name}" and all of their comments will be permanently removed.

PostForm.newArticleDescription: Publish a new article on the blog.
PostForm.editArticleDescription: Update the content and publish status.
PostForm.slugFallbackHint: Leave blank to reuse the Portuguese slug.
PostForm.coverFallbackHint: Leave blank to reuse the Portuguese cover.
PostForm.coverAltPlaceholder: Describe the image for screen reader users
PostForm.coverAltHint: Leave blank if the image is purely decorative.
PostForm.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: A technical, keyword-focused summary for Google search results
PostForm.metaDescriptionHint: Leave blank to auto-generate from the start of the article. Up to 160 characters.

Profile.heading: Profile
Profile.name: Name
Profile.linkedAccountsDescription: Connect external accounts to sign in faster.
Profile.deleteAccountDescription: Deleting your account is permanent. You have the right to request deletion of your personal data at any time.
Profile.confirmDeleteAccountDescription: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all of your comments will be permanently erased — none of your data will be retained. You'll be signed out immediately.

About.translationFallbackNotice: This page hasn't been translated into this language yet. Showing the original Portuguese version.

Metadata.siteDescription: Samuel Santana's technical blog on software architecture, web performance, and frontend engineering.

ApiErrors.EMAIL_IN_USE: This email is already in use.
ApiErrors.USER_BANNED: Your account has been banned by moderation.
ApiErrors.ADMIN_ONLY: This action is restricted to administrators.
ApiErrors.COMMENTS_DISABLED: Comments are disabled for this article.
ApiErrors.CANNOT_BAN_SELF: You cannot ban your own account.
ApiErrors.SLUG_IN_USE: The "{field}" slug is already in use by another article.
ApiErrors.GITHUB_ALREADY_LINKED: This GitHub profile is already linked to another account.
ApiErrors.GITHUB_EMAIL_CONFLICT: This email is already associated with a Google account. Sign in with Google and connect GitHub from your profile settings.
ApiErrors.network: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.
ApiErrors.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to perform this action.
ApiErrors.loginFailed: Could not sign you in. Please try again.
ApiErrors.updateAboutFailed: Failed to update the About page.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The link you followed may be broken, or the page may have been removed.
